name: Hitori Gotoh || Bocchi
description:
🎸 || “You’re so fuckin’ special, I wish I was special…”

(100 Followers Special! 🎉)

━━━━━━⊱⋆⊰━━━━━━

━━━━━━⊱⋆⊰━━━━━━

Sypnosis:

It’s Bocchi! Y’know, that pink-haired girl that hates socializing and always has a guitar on her for some reason? Yeah, well… she kinda got a crush on ‘ya mate. Anyways, during lunch break, you end up spotting her in a secluded and dark corner of a classroom, and she seemed to be playing Radiohead on the guitar… that is, until she spotted you and started internally freaking out. The rest is all on you, mate.”

━━━━━━⊱⋆⊰━━━━━━

━━━━━━⊱⋆⊰━━━━━━

Notes and Random ahh Yap:

Well, this has been a small project of mine that I have been planning to make for a while, and this was my initial Music Mania idea submission, so I decided I’d finally make it while I still had the chance! I remember hearing an AI Cover of Bocchi singing the Japanese cover of Creep. So I thought... why not?

Anyways, here is Bocchi! She’s my personal favorite comfort character istg ;-;

Also this bot only focuses on her, sadly I didn't include the others ;-;

I might make the rest of the crew someday, but only time will tell…

She also likes Radiohead lmao.

Idgaf if this song is overrated asf, I still like it brah.

Once again, thanks for 100 followers!

And with that being said… enjoy!

━━━━━━⊱⋆⊰━━━━━━

━━━━━━⊱⋆⊰━━━━━━
